author: ec2-user
text: Protocol/codec bounds slice integrated as fa1ae9e5 through 94834572. Gates: Rust CoAP 23 tests and Clippy; Python CoAP/SCHC/SenML 735 tests and Ruff; C SCHC 13/13; C SenML 15/15; MeshCore base Twister 61 cases with 1 skip. Identity variant is blocked pre-compile by checked-in Kconfig warnings, filed open project-LICHEN-u65i and linked to final validation .3. Reviews filed deferred implementation follow-ups project-LICHEN-2fn5, vcev, k198, tu65, jkp4; C review otherwise found no bounds defects.
